title: A2A Ingest Pipeline
description: Ingesting agent-to-agent payloads: validation, transformation, storage, and acknowledgment
start: main() invoked (try/catch wrapper; exits with code 1 on uncaught error)
activity_steps: 1. RESOLVE INPUT — parse CLI args for optional inputPath; read env vars (A2A_SOURCE, A2A_EXTERNAL_CONFIDENCE_FACTOR, A2A_EMIT_DECISIONS, A2A_SIGNALS)
2. READ TEXT — if inputPath provided: a2a.readTextIfExists(inputPath); else: readStdin() via fs.readFileSync(0,'utf8')
3. PARSE — a2a.parseA2AInput(text) → parsed[] array of objects
4. PARSE SIGNALS — parseSignalsFromEnv() → signals[]; tries JSON.parse(A2A_SIGNALS), falls back to comma-split
5. LOOP over each parsed object obj
8.     INTEGRITY FAIL → rejected++; if emitDecisions: a2aProto.buildDecision({decision:'reject', reason:'asset_id integrity check failed'}) → a2aProto.getTransport().send(dm); continue
9.   TRANSFORM — a2a.lowerConfidence(obj, {source, factor}) → staged; if falsy → skip
12.  ACKNOWLEDGE — if emitDecisions: a2aProto.buildDecision({decision:'quarantine', reason:'staged as external candidate'}) → a2aProto.getTransport().send(dm2) [errors swallowed]
14. END LOOP — write 'accepted=N rejected=M' to stdout
decision_points: obj.asset_id present AND is string → trigger integrity check branch
key_env_vars: A2A_SIGNALS — JSON array or comma-separated string of signal tags
error_handling: Top-level try/catch: any uncaught error → stderr + process.exit(1)
contentHash.verifyAssetId failure → increment rejected, optionally emit 'reject' decision, continue loop
output: JSONL appended to external candidate store (assetStore)
Optional protocol decision messages sent via a2aProto transport
important_notes: Pipeline processes each parsed item independently. Confidence is always lowered before storage (lowerConfidence with configurable factor). Failed integrity check items are counted and optionally ACK'd as 'reject'; accepted items are ACK'd as 'quarantine' (staged, not trusted). Two distinct swallowed-error zones ensure partial failures in graph/transport don't abort the pipeline.
